vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #11: NPM + PIP CLI distribution (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`, `pipx install deft-cli`)

plan.title: NPM + PIP CLI distribution (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`, `pipx install deft-cli`)

x-migrator.PhaseDescription:
Publish deft as NPM + PIP CLI packages for developer-audience install.
Complements the Go installer (which targets novice/bare-machine users).
x-migrator.Description: NPM + PIP CLI distribution (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`, `pipx install deft-cli`)

references.title: Issue #11: NPM + PIP CLI distribution (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`, `pipx install deft-cli`)
Product-scope the npm packages and wire the directive/deft bins
Publish content as @deftai/directive-content and resolve it from the package
Implement the directive verb router and top-level UX verbs
Make directive init/update a front-end to the deft-install binary
Migrate product slash commands to /deft:directive:* with aliases
Add the npm publish workflow with provenance
Document the Deft-company / Directive-product model and npm install paths
